name: smart-fin-365
description: Smart Fin 365 web app for synced finance records.

scripts.android:debug: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.ios:archive: cap sync ios && echo Open ios/App/App.xcodeproj in Xcode, select Any iOS Device, then Product > Archive to export an IPA.
